boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on consent-status class
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Abstract consent-status class unverified per FEAS-BOR-082 and policy
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-BOR-082 lacks consent-status class before enrollment

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. AUTH-BOR-082 and ACT-BOR-082 confirm site, protocol, consent C12, and date but omit required consent-status class. FEAS-BOR-082 explicitly requires separate verification before enrollment. Per STD-BOR-082-P, activation authority must match all elements including consent-status class. Escalate to resolve abstract-field trap before proceeding.
